programme.title: Speed
programme.desc: Los Angeles police officer Jack (Keanu Reeves) angers retired bomb squad member Howard Payne (Dennis Hopper) by foiling his attempt at taking hostages. In revenge, Payne arms a bus with a bomb that will explode if it drops below 50 miles per hour. With the help of spunky passenger Annie (Sandra Bullock), Jack and his partner Harry (Jeff Daniels) try to save the people on the bus before the bomb go

Stumbling upon an ancient tomb, the hunters unwittingly set loose a 3,000-year-old legacy of terror, which is embodied in the vengeful reincarnation of an Egyptian priest who had been sentenced to an eternity as one of the living dead.

programme.title: The Rock

Hummel (Ed Harris) from launching chemical weapons on Alcatraz Island into San Francisco. Gen. Hummel demands $100 million in war reparations to be paid to the families of slain servicemen who died on covert operations. Afte

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent, silverback gorilla that's been in his care since birth. When a rogue genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an

programme.title: Tomb Raider
programme.desc: Lara Croft is the fiercely independent daughter of an eccentric adventurer who vanished years earlier. Hoping to solve the mystery of her father's disappearance, Croft embarks on a perilous journey to his last-known destination -- a fabled tomb on a mythical island that might be somewhere off the coast of Japan. The stakes couldn't be higher as Lara must rely on her sharp mind, blind faith and stu

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: Sensual and savage, Lorraine Broughton is the most elite spy in MI6, an agent who's willing to use all of her lethal skills to stay alive during an impossible mission. With the Berlin Wall about to fall, she travels into the heart of the city to retrieve a priceless dossier and take down a ruthless espionage ring. Once there, she teams up with an embedded station chief to navigate her way through

programme.title: Stoker
programme.desc: India Stoker's (Mia Wasikowska) world comes crashing down when her father (Jacki Weaver) dies in a car accident. Adding to the girl's emotional turmoil is the sudden arrival of Charlie (Matthew Goode), an uncle whom she never knew existed. Charlie moves in with India and her unstable mother (Nicole Kidman), and soon India begins to suspect that this charming and mysterious man has ulterior motives

programme.title: It
programme.desc: Seven young outcasts in Derry, Maine, are about to face their worst nightmare -- an ancient, shape-shifting evil that emerges from the sewer every 27 years to prey on the town's children. Banding together over the course of one horrifying summer, the friends must overcome their own personal fears to battle the murderous, bloodthirsty clown known as Pennywise.

programme.title: It: Chapter Two
programme.desc: Defeated by members of the Losers' Club, the evil clown Pennywise returns 27 years later to terrorize the town of Derry, Maine, once again. Now adults, the childhood friends have long since gone their separate ways. But when people start disappearing, Mike Hanlon calls the others home for one final stand. Damaged by scars from the past, the united Losers must conquer their deepest fears to destroy

programme.title: Opus
programme.desc: A journalist is invited to the remote compound of a legendary pop star who mysteriously disappeared 30 years ago. Surrounded by the star's cult of sycophants, she gets caught in the middle of his twisted plan.

programme.title: Y2K
programme.desc: On the last night of 1999, two high school juniors crash a New Year's Eve party, only to find themselves fighting for their lives when the terror of Y2K becomes a reality and all machines rise up against humanity.

programme.title: Waitress: The Musical
programme.desc: Jenna Hunterson is a waitress and expert pie maker stuck in a small town and a loveless marriage. When a baking contest offers her a chance at escape, Jenna fights to reclaim part of herself.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

programme.title: Knox Goes Away
programme.desc: Diagnosed with a rapidly evolving form of dementia, a contract killer gets the chance to redeem himself by saving the life of his estranged son.

programme.title: Goodrich
programme.desc: Art dealer Andy Goodrich's life gets upended when his younger wife leaves him and enters a 90-day rehab program while also threatening divorce. Andy takes charge of their 9-year-old twins, thrusting him into the world of modern parenthood for which he is deeply unprepared. With his career falling by the wayside, he soon leans on his pregnant daughter for support, ultimately becoming the father she

programme.title: The Terminator
programme.desc: Disguised as a human, a cyborg assassin known as a Terminator (Arnold Schwarzenegger) travels from 2029 to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor (Linda Hamilton). Sent to protect Sarah is Kyle Reese (Michael Biehn), who divulges the coming of Skynet, an artificial intelligence system that will spark a nuclear holocaust. Sarah is targeted because Skynet knows that her unborn son will lead the fight against the

programme.title: Mothra vs. Godzilla
programme.desc: Japan comes under attack from two monsters in a giant monster battle between a rampaging Godzilla and the colossal genetically engineered moth called Mothra.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Gigan
programme.desc: Godzilla and Anguirus fight three-headed dragon Ghidorah and huge bird Gigan at a cartoonist's theme park.

programme.title: Godzilla Raids Again
programme.desc: Prehistoric monsters Godzilla and Anguirus battle it out in Osaka, Japan.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Biollante
programme.desc: A monster dinosaur wrecks Tokyo some more and meets a monster plant created from his own cells.

programme.title: The Return of Godzilla
programme.desc: Okumura witnesses a huge monster during a storm. Biologist Hayashida hears Okumura's story from Toto Nippo reporter Maki and concludes that Godzilla, who was buried 30 years ago, has come back to life. Godzilla then appears in Tokyo Bay.

programme.title: Destroy All Monsters!
programme.desc: Scientists face Godzilla, Rodan, Mothra and more obscure Japanese monsters sent by she-aliens.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Mechagodzilla
programme.desc: An Okinawan monster-god helps Godzilla defeat his bionic double.

programme.title: Working Girls
programme.desc: College graduate Molly (Louise Smith), trying to bankroll her own business, works as a high-priced New York City escort. As a lesbian, she's able to keep her emotional distance from the clients, who range from cynically exploitative to desperately needy. But her open ambition to rise above her current station rubs many of her coworkers the wrong way, especially the combative, street-smart Dawn (Am

programme.title: Son of Godzilla
programme.desc: In this Japanese monster movie, the massive Godzilla comes to the aid of his newborn son, who hatches from an egg on a remote island where scientists are conducting experiments with radioactivity. Revealing a surprising paternal streak, Godzilla tries to teach his much smaller progeny how to use his powers. The father/son team must then battle giant insects, including praying mantises and a formid

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Megalon
programme.desc: Godzilla and flying cyborg Jet Jaguar meet a giant cockroach and a big black chicken sent by Seatopians.

programme.title: Red Riding Hood
programme.desc: Young Valerie (Amanda Seyfried) feels torn between two men. She loves Peter, but her parents intend that she marry wealthy Henry. Valerie and Peter are going to run away together, but her sister is killed by a werewolf before they can put their plan into action. The villagers call on the help of Father Solomon (Gary Oldman), a famous monster hunter who warns that the beast takes human form by day.

programme.title: Blood Simple
programme.desc: "Blood Simple" was the first feature film from Joel and Ethan Coen. This is the newly restored and re-edited director's cut of the film, introduced by Mortimer Young. The stylish crime thriller premiered at film festivals in 1984. "Blood Simple" begins deep in the heart of Texas, where a jealous saloon owner hires a cheap divorce detective to kill the saloon owner's younger wife and her bartender

programme.title: Volunteers
programme.desc: Hoping to avoid gambling debts, rich playboy Lawrence Bourne (Tom Hanks) stows away on a plane of Peace Corps volunteers set for Thailand. Once aboard, he meets the outrageously affable Tom Tuttle (John Candy), who shows him the ropes. After landing, the crew is stationed in a small town where they are to construct a bridge. Along with the lovely and altruistic Beth Wexler (Rita Wilson), the group

programme.title: The Art of Getting By
programme.desc: George (Freddie Highmore) is a senior at a posh Manhattan prep school, but his disaffected attitude leaves little room for toeing the line. He'd rather doodle and read philosophy, and he strenuously avoids his parents (Rita Wilson, Sam Robards) whenever possible. Unfortunately, George's attitude is endangering his chances of graduating. Then he meets Sally (Emma Roberts). George finds himself fall

programme.title: The Wolfman
programme.desc: Though absent from his ancestral home of Blackmoor for many years, aristocrat Lawrence Talbot returns to find his missing brother at the request of the latter's fiancée, Gwen. He learns that a creature has links to an ancient curse turning people into werewolves when the moon is full. To save the village and protect Gwen, he must slay the bloodthirsty beast, but he contends with a horrifying famil

programme.title: Hop
programme.desc: Beneath Easter Island, in a giant factory that manufactures the world's Easter candy, the popular rabbit is preparing to pass the mantle to his son, E.B. (Russell Brand). But E.B. has no interest in the job and would rather be a drummer. He runs away to Los Angeles, where an unemployed slacker named Fred O'Hare (James Marsden) accidentally runs into him. Feigning injury, E.B. tricks Fred into givi

programme.title: Fargo
programme.desc: "Fargo" is a reality-based crime drama set in Minnesota in 1987. Jerry Lundegaard (William H. Macy) is a car salesman in Minneapolis who has gotten himself into debt and is so desperate for money that he hires two thugs (Steve Buscemi), (Peter Stormare) to kidnap his own wife. Jerry will collect the ransom from her wealthy father (Harve Presnell), paying the thugs a small portion and keeping the r

programme.title: Green Zone
programme.desc: Chief Warrant Officer Roy Miller and his team of inspectors are on a mission in 2003 to find Iraq's reported stockpiles of weapons of mass destruction. Traveling from one dangerous site to another, Miller and his team fail to find any chemical agents or other weapons. Instead, they discover an elaborate coverup in which the most-elusive weapon is truth.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Now that Chris and his girlfriend, Rose, have reached the meet-the-parents milestone of dating, she invites him for a weekend getaway with Missy and Dean. At first, Chris reads the family's overly accommodating behavior as nervous attempts to deal with their daughter's interracial relationship, but as the weekend progresses, a series of increasingly disturbing discoveries leads him to a truth that

programme.title: Companion
programme.desc: A weekend getaway at a remote cabin turns to chaos when it's revealed that one of the guests -- a subservient android built for human companionship -- has gone haywire.

programme.title: Sucker Punch
programme.desc: Locked away, a young woman named Babydoll retreats to a fantasy world where she is free to go wherever her mind takes her. Determined to fight for real freedom, she finds four women -- Rocket, Blondie, Amber and Sweet Pea -- to join together to escape the terrible fate that awaits them. With a virtual arsenal at their disposal, the allies battle everything from samurais to serpents, while trying t

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets
programme.desc: In the 28th century, special operatives Valerian and Laureline work together to maintain order throughout the human territories. Under assignment from the minister of defense, the duo embarks on a mission to Alpha, an ever-expanding metropolis where diverse species gather to share knowledge and culture. When a dark force threatens the peaceful city, Valerian and Laureline must race against time to

programme.title: Blue Beetle
programme.desc: Jaime Reyes suddenly finds himself in possession of an ancient relic of alien biotechnology called the Scarab. When the Scarab chooses Jaime to be its symbiotic host, he's bestowed with an incredible suit of armor that's capable of extraordinary and unpredictable powers, forever changing his destiny as he becomes the superhero Blue Beetle.

programme.title: They All Laughed
programme.desc: The employees of New York City's Odyssey Detective Agency can't seem to prevent themselves from getting over-involved in their clients' lives. When aging gumshoe John Russo (Ben Gazzara) is assigned to trail an Italian millionaire's wife, Angela (Audrey Hepburn), he inevitably falls for her continental charm. His partner, Charles (John Ritter), is similarly unable to keep his hands off the woman h

programme.title: This Is Not a War Story
programme.desc: Some veterans take part in an unusual art project designed to help them deal with the leftover trauma associated with their combat experiences.

programme.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
programme.desc: Everyone in the Portokalos family worries about Toula (Nia Vardalos). Still unmarried at 30 years old, she works at Dancing Zorba's, the Greek restaurant owned by her parents, Gus (Michael Constantine) and Maria (Lainie Kazan). After taking a job at her aunt's travel agency, she falls in love with Ian Miller (John Corbett), a teacher who is tall, handsome and definitely not Greek. Toula isn't sure

programme.title: The Best Exotic Marigold Hotel
programme.desc: Some British retirees (Judi Dench, Maggie Smith, Bill Nighy) decide to outsource their retirement to exotic -- and less expensive -- India. Lured by advertisements for the newly restored Marigold Hotel and imagining a life of leisure in lush surroundings, they arrive and find that the Marigold is actually a shell of its former self. Though their new home is not quite what they had imagined, the re

programme.title: Goodbye Christopher Robin
programme.desc: After leaving London for the English countryside, writer A.A. Milne starts to spin fanciful yarns about his son's growing collection of stuffed animals. These stories form the basis for Winnie-the-Pooh and The House at Pooh Corner, published respectively in 1926 and 1928. Milne and his family soon become swept up in the instant success of the books, while the enchanting tales bring hope and comfor

programme.title: Parental Guidance
programme.desc: Minor-league baseball announcer Artie Decker (Billy Crystal) and his wife, Diane (Bette Midler), get to see their only child, Alice (Marisa Tomei), very seldom. To their surprise, Alice and her husband (Tom Everett Scott) ask them to watch their children so they can embark on a trip for work. It promises to be a fun time for all, until the three young ones turn out to be quite a handful for this o

programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Aspiring country singer Patsy Cline (Jessica Lange) is resigned to both her thankless gigs and her unhappy marriage, until she meets the charismatic Charlie Dick (Ed Harris). Eventually leaving her husband to marry Charlie, Patsy temporarily shelves her performing career to be a mother. Later she returns to singing and finds success under manager Randy Hughes (David Clennon). Patsy hits a remarkab

programme.title: The Hole in the Ground
programme.desc: One night, Sarah's young son disappears into the woods behind their rural home. When he returns, he looks the same, but his behavior grows increasingly disturbing. Sarah begins to believe that the boy who returned may not be her son at all.

programme.title: The Belko Experiment
programme.desc: An ordinary day at the office becomes a horrific quest for survival when 80 employees at the Belko Corp. in Bogotá, Colombia, learn that they are pawns in a deadly game. Trapped inside their building, a voice over an intercom tells the frightened staffers that two workers must be killed within 30 minutes. When another ultimatum follows, friends become enemies and new alliances take shape, as only

programme.title: Trap
programme.desc: A man and his teenage daughter realize they're at the center of a dark and sinister event while watching a concert.

programme.title: Maze Runner: The Death Cure
programme.desc: Thomas leads some escaped Gladers on their final and most dangerous mission yet. To save their friends, they must break into the legendary Last City, a WCKD-controlled labyrinth that may turn out to be the deadliest maze of all. Anyone who makes it out alive will get answers to the questions that the Gladers have been asking since they arrived in the maze.

programme.title: Papillon
programme.desc: The epic story of Henri Papillon Charrière, a safecracker from the Parisian underworld who is framed for murder and condemned to life in the notorious penal colony on Devil's Island. Determined to regain his freedom, Papillon forms an unlikely alliance with convicted counterfeiter Louis Dega, who in exchange for protection, agrees to finance Papillon's escape.

programme.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
programme.desc: Young Furiosa gets caught in the crossfire of two tyrannical warlords. As the tyrants fight for dominance, Furiosa soon finds herself in a nonstop battle to make her way home.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Scorpion's Revenge
programme.desc: The champions of Outworld and Earthrealm fight to the death in a brutal tournament that determines the fate of Earth.

programme.title: Ghost Dog: The Way of the Samurai
programme.desc: Ghost Dog (Forest Whitaker) is a contract killer, a master of his trade who can whirl a gun at warp speed and moves through this world like a phantom -- stealthy and evanescent. In the spirit of the samurai, he has pledged his loyalty to a small time mobster named Louie (John Tormey) who saved his life many years before.

programme.title: Godzilla vs. Biollante
programme.desc: A monster dinosaur wrecks Tokyo some more and meets a monster plant created from his own cells.

programme.title: It
programme.desc: In 1960, seven preteen outcasts fight an evil demon that poses as a child-killing clown. Thirty years later, they reunite to stop the demon once and for all when it returns to their hometown.

programme.title: Scanners
programme.desc: Scanners are men and women born with incredible telepathic and telekinetic powers. There are many who exercise the benefits of their special gifts in a safe and judicious manner. However, there is a group of renegade scanners who plan to create a race that will rule the world.

programme.title: House of 1000 Corpses
programme.desc: An empty fuel tank and a flat tire lead two couples down a terror-riddled road to the House of 1000 Corpses. House of 1000 Corpses is at its core a story of family - a cast of twisted individuals who, with each slash of a throat or stab through the chest, add bodies to their sick human menagerie.

programme.title: Stoker
programme.desc: India Stoker's (Mia Wasikowska) world comes crashing down when her father (Jacki Weaver) dies in a car accident. Adding to the girl's emotional turmoil is the sudden arrival of Charlie (Matthew Goode), an uncle whom she never knew existed. Charlie moves in with India and her unstable mother (Nicole Kidman), and soon India begins to suspect that this charming and mysterious man has ulterior motives

programme.title: Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire
programme.desc: Godzilla and the almighty Kong face a colossal threat hidden deep within the planet, challenging their very existence and the survival of the human race.

programme.title: Knives Out
programme.desc: Sharp, eccentric murder-mystery starring Daniel Craig as a detective anonymously hired to investigate the death of a wealthy writer (Christopher Plummer). With Ana de Armas.

programme.title: Career Girls
programme.desc: Mike Leigh's poingnant drama stars Katrin Cartlidge and Lynda Steadman as old college friends who meet up only to discover they still suffer from emotional fragility.

programme.title: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: Classic 'cowboys and Indians' Western. Gary Cooper, Richard Widmark and Cameron Mitchell star as three rascals hired by Susan Hayward to rescue her husband from Apache territory.

programme.title: Magnificent Obsession
programme.desc: Douglas Sirk's melodrama starring Rock Hudson and Jane Wyman. A playboy reforms his lifestyle in order to seek forgiveness from a woman whose husband's death he inadvertently caused.

programme.title: The Enemy Below
programme.desc: Second World War thriller. Robert Mitchum stars as the captain of a US destroyer in the North Atlantic hunting down a German U-boat and its world-weary captain, Curt Jurgens.

programme.title: The Lavender Hill Mob
programme.desc: Classic Ealing comedy starring Alec Guinness as a mild-mannered bank clerk who assembles a gang to hijack a million quid's worth of gold. Which is when their problems really start..

programme.title: Dad's Army
programme.desc: Toby Jones and Catherine Zeta-Jones lead a stellar cast in a reboot of the comedy classic. The hapless Home Guard platoon gets involved with D-Day. But there's a spy in their midst.

programme.title: The Equalizer 2
programme.desc: Action crime thriller sequel. Denzel Washington returns as Robert McCall, who's out for revenge after ruthless killers murder an agency contact who he also considered a friend.

programme.title: The Hunt
programme.desc: Fighty, satirical horror that upset Donald Trump. Hilary Swank plays a rich lefty who likes hunting working class people to the death. But she didn't reckon on Betty Gilpin.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Based on the novel by Richard Hooker, M*A*S*H follows a group of Mobile Army Surgical Hospital officers at they perform surgery and pass the time just miles from the front lines of the Korean Conflict. Led by Captains Hawkeye Pierce (Donald Sutherland) and Trapper John McIntyre (Elliott Gould), they add to the chaos and hilarity of the situation.

programme.title: Daddio
programme.desc: A woman gets into a taxi at New York airport and gradually tells the driver about her unfortunate decisions that led to an affair with a married man; the driver also reveals more and more about his life.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: In the years after the Civil War, Jo March lives in New York and makes her living as a writer, while her sister Amy studies painting in Paris. Amy has a chance encounter with Theodore, a childhood crush who proposed to Jo but was ultimately rejected. Their oldest sibling, Meg, is married to a schoolteacher, while shy sister Beth develops a devastating illness that brings the family back together.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: When a lively young family moves in next door, grumpy widower Otto Anderson meets his match in a quick-witted, pregnant woman named Marisol, leading to an unlikely friendship that turns his world upside down.

programme.title: From

programme.title: A Quiet Place: Day One

programme.desc: Gunned down by Detective Mike Norris (Chris Sarandon), dying murderer Charles Lee Ray (Brad Dourif) uses black magic to put his soul inside a doll named Chucky -- which Karen Barclay (Catherine Hicks) then buys for her young son, Andy (Alex Vincent). programme.title: The Woman in Black
programme.desc: Arthur Kipps, a lawyer, is recently widowed and grieving the loss of his wife when he is sent to a remote village to put a deceased eccentric's affairs in order. Soon after his arrival, it becomes clear that the villagers are hiding a terrible secret. Kipps discovers that his late client's house is haunted by the spirit of a woman who is trying to find someone and something she lost, and that no o

programme.title: Neil Young: Heart of Gold
programme.desc: Shot over the span of two nights in the summer of 2005 at Ryman Auditorium in Nashville, Tenn., this Jonathan Demme concert film combines interviews with Neil Young and other band members with the premiere of various songs from the album "Prairie Wind." programme.desc: King Henry VIII has died, and his only heir, a young Edward VI (Warren Saire), is dying too. Minister John Dudley (John Wood) doesn't want the Roman Catholic Princess Mary (Jane Lapotaire) to become queen, as that would end the Protestant Reformation. programme.title: To Catch a Thief

When her jewels are stolen, Francie suspects John, destro

programme.title: Baywatch

Joined by a trio of hotshot recruits, including former Olympian Matt Brody, they ditch the surf and go deep under cover to take down a ruthless businesswoman whose devious plans threaten the future of the bay.

programme.title: Novocaine

programme.title: The Heartbreak Kid

programme.title: Valley Girl

programme.title: Throw Momma From the Train
programme.desc: Larry (Billy Crystal), an author with a cruel ex-wife, Margaret (Kate Mulgrew), teaches a writing workshop where Owen (Danny DeVito), one of his students, is fed up with his domineering mother (Anne Ramsey). programme.title: Stripes
programme.desc: Hard-luck cabbie John Winger (Bill Murray) -- directionless after being fired from his job and dumped by his girlfriend -- enlists in the U.S. Army with his close pal, Russell Ziskey (Harold Ramis). programme.title: Frankie & Johnny

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love

A young Shakespeare is out of cash and ideas; he meets his ideal woman and she inspires him to write one of his most famous plays.

programme.title: Serendipity

When love feels like magic, it is called destiny; when destiny has a sense of humor, it is serendipity.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: As Tabitha and Jade's troubling history is brought to light, things begin to unravel for another resident in town; Boyd wants to test a dangerous theory.

programme.title: From
programme.desc: A dangerous plan begins to take shape; how much is Boyd willing to risk for the chance to get everyone home?; Fatima and Henry find themselves at two very different and disturbing crossroads; Victor helps Tabitha and Ethan prepare for the worst.

programme.desc: Max, a military service dog, is assigned to serve on the U.S. president's Secret Service detail.

programme.title: Suburbicon
programme.desc: Suburbicon is a peaceful, idyllic, suburban community with affordable homes and manicured lawns -- the perfect place to raise a family, and in the summer of 1959, the Lodge family is doing just that. But the tranquil surface masks a disturbing reality, as husband and father Gardner Lodge must navigate the town's dark underbelly of betrayal, deceit and violence.

programme.desc: Jennifer (Alicia Silverstone) is a lovely teen who has been hired to baby-sit the kids of Harry Tucker (J.T. Walsh) and his wife, Dolly (Lee Garlington). After taking a job at her aunt's travel agency, she falls in love with Ian Miller (John Corbett), a teacher who is tall, handsome and definitely not Greek. Toula isn't sure

programme.title: The Best Exotic Marigold Hotel
programme.desc: Some British retirees (Judi Dench, Maggie Smith, Bill Nighy) decide to outsource their retirement to exotic -- and less expensive -- India. Though their new home is not quite what they had imagined, the re

programme.title: Goodbye Christopher Robin
programme.desc: After leaving London for the English countryside, writer A.A. Milne starts to spin fanciful yarns about his son's growing collection of stuffed animals. programme.desc: Minor-league baseball announcer Artie Decker (Billy Crystal) and his wife, Diane (Bette Midler), get to see their only child, Alice (Marisa Tomei), very seldom. programme.title: Sweet Dreams
programme.desc: Aspiring country singer Patsy Cline (Jessica Lange) is resigned to both her thankless gigs and her unhappy marriage, until she meets the charismatic Charlie Dick (Ed Harris). Later she returns to singing and finds success under manager Randy Hughes (David Clennon). Patsy hits a remarkab

programme.title: Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: The last of five coveted "golden tickets" falls into the hands of a sweet but very poor boy. He and his grandpa then get a tour of the strangest chocolate factory in the world. The owner leads five young winners on a thrilling and often dangerous tour of his factory.

As the holiday unfolds, they experience first dates, longtime commitments, youthful crushes and connections to old flames.

programme.desc: A man tries to protect his daughter from the dangers of the world after a devastating plague wipes out most of the female population.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: Two years before the Civil War, Django (Jamie Foxx), a slave, finds himself accompanying an unorthodox German bounty hunter named Dr. King Schultz (Christoph Waltz) on a mission to capture the vicious Brittle brothers. programme.title: Not Without Hope
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as Capt. Timothy Close and his Coast Guard crew launch a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.desc: In the final installment to this trilogy, a murder spree begins to happen again; this time targeted toward the original Woodsboro survivors and those associated with the movie-inside-a-movie, Stab 3. Sydney must face the demons of her past to stop the killer(s).

programme.title: Hardball

Surprising even himself, Conor becomes attached to his players -- and to their attractive schoolteacher (Diane Lan

programme.title: Crisis
programme.desc: A drug trafficker organizes a smuggling operation while a recovering addict seeks the truth behind her son's disappearance.

programme.desc: A man with a violent past kidnaps the boy he holds responsible for his son's death. As he grows closer to uncovering the truth, he's left to wonder whether his pursuers are really seeking to protect the boy, or merely the secrets he keeps.

programme.title: Stop-Loss
programme.desc: His tour of duty in Iraq finally over, Staff Sgt. Brandon King returns home to Brazos, Texas, ready to re-enter civilian life. Unexpectedly, the Army invokes a clause in Brandon's military contract, requiring him to return to active duty in Iraq. With the help of close friend Michele, Brandon goes AWOL and struggles to find a way out of the dilemma.

programme.title: 22 Jump Street
programme.desc: Although they made their way through high school successfully, an investigation at a local college brings big changes for undercover officers Jenko and Schmidt. When Jenko meets a kindred spirit on the football team and Schmidt infiltrates the bohemian art-major scene, both men begin to question their partnership. Not only do they have to crack the case, but now the two overgrown adolescents must

programme.title: Scream 4
programme.desc: It has been many years since the Ghostface Killer cut a deadly path through the town of Woodsboro. In order to get over the trauma of those horrific events, Sidney Prescott (Neve Campbell) has written a self-help book. programme.title: Shell
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: Buddy Games
programme.desc: After a falling out, six lifelong friends reunite to play the buddy games -- an insane competition filled with absurd physical and mental challenges. Now, all bets are off, as the determined pals fight, claw and party for the chance to win $150,000.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: When cops Schmidt and Jenko join the secret Jump Street unit, they use their youthful appearances to go undercover as high-school students. programme.desc: Pittsburgh boxers Billy "The Kid" McDonnen (Robert De Niro) and Henry "Razor" Sharp (Sylvester Stallone) shared a fierce rivalry back in the 1980s. Each had scored a victory in two matches, but on the eve of their decisive third bout, Henry suddenly announced his retirement, effectively ending both boxers' careers. programme.desc: Once a collegiate wrestler, Scott Voss (Kevin James) is now a 42-year-old, apathetic biology teacher in a failing high school. programme.title: Kickback
programme.desc: A documentary following the decades-long crusade of investigative journalist Andrew Jennings to expose corruption inside FIFA, football's sole governing body and the largest sports organization in the world.

programme.desc: Billy "The Great" Hope (Jake Gyllenhaal), the reigning junior middleweight boxing champion, has an impressive career, a loving wife and daughter, and a lavish lifestyle. However, when tragedy strikes, Billy hits rock bottom, losing his family, his house and his manager. programme.title: Paid in Full
programme.desc: In the late 1980s, Ace (Wood Harris) is a young man employed by a Harlem dry cleaning shop, working hard to stay out of the drug business. programme.title: Run & Gun
programme.desc: After leaving a life of crime and violence, reformed good guy Ray enjoys a quiet family life in the suburbs. However, Ray's past comes back to haunt him as he gets blackmailed into one last job to collect a mysterious package. After a deadly double-cross, he soon finds himself wounded and on the run from ruthless assassins who will stop at nothing to get what he has.

programme.title: The Girl in the Pool
programme.desc: A man's life collapses when his mistress is found dead in his pool. Terrified of the consequences and desperate to protect his family, he conceals the truth, triggering a chaotic night that threatens to unravel his perfect life.

programme.title: Personal Shopper
programme.desc: A young American in Paris works as a personal shopper for a celebrity. She seems to have the ability to communicate with spirits, like her recently deceased twin brother. Soon, she starts to receive ambiguous messages from an unknown source.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick
programme.desc: After more than 30 years of service as one of the Navy's top aviators, Pete "Maverick" Mitchell is where he belongs, pushing the envelope as a courageous test pilot and dodging the advancement in rank that would ground him. programme.title: Monstrous
programme.desc: A terrifying new horror awaits Laura and her 7-year-old son, Cody, when then they flee her abusive ex-husband and try to settle into a new life in an idyllic and remote lakeside farmhouse. Still traumatized, their physical and mental well-being are pushed to the limit as their fragile existence is threatened.

programme.title: Ride

programme.title: Daniela Forever

programme.title: The Last Duel

Jacques Le Gris is a squire whose intelligence and eloquence makes him one of the most admired nobles in court. programme.title: Hamburger Hill

Frantz (Dylan McDermott) and composed of both seasoned troops and new recruits, attempts to take a hill during the Vietnam War. programme.title: Flight of the Intruder
programme.desc: U.S. Navy pilot Lt. Jake Grafton (Brad Johnson) and his bombardier buddy, Lt. Cmdr. Virgil Cole (Willem Dafoe), are two soldiers embedded in the Vietnam War growing frustrated by the military's constraints on their missions. programme.desc: Col. Terry Childers (Samuel L. Jackson) is a 30-year Marine veteran: a decorated officer with combat experience in Vietnam, Beirut and Desert Storm -- a patriot, a hero. Hays Hodges (Tommy Lee Jones), a comrade-in-arms who owes his life to Childers.

programme.desc: Recorded in front of a live audience in New York City, this film features actor/comedian Eddie Murphy performing a scathing comedy routine. Eddie's uncle (Samuel L. programme.title: Blue Story

programme.title: Noah's Arc: Jumping the Broom
programme.desc: Gay couple Noah (Darryl Stephens) and Wade (Jensen Atwood) invite their friends along for a weekend of revelry when they decide to get married in Martha's Vineyard.

programme.title: Flight of the Intruder
programme.desc: U.S. Navy pilot Lt. Jake Grafton (Brad Johnson) and his bombardier buddy, Lt. Cmdr. Virgil Cole (Willem Dafoe), are two soldiers embedded in the Vietnam War growing frustrated by the military's constraints on their missions. programme.title: Passion Play: Russell Westbrook

programme.title: Spotlights: A Showtime Short Film Series
programme.desc: A collection of short films showcasing different themes.

programme.desc: Years after his squad was ambushed during the Gulf War, Major Ben Marco (Denzel Washington) finds himself having terrible nightmares. As Marco's doubts deepen, Shaw's political power grows, and, when Marco finds a mysterious implant embedded i

programme.title: The One and Only Dick Gregory
programme.desc: Filmmaker Andre Gaines examines the remarkable life and career of stand-up comic, activist and pop culture icon Dick Gregory. Features interviews with Dave Chappelle, Chris Rock, Kevin Hart and others.

programme.title: The Hurricane
programme.desc: Denzel Washington is Rubin "Hurricane" Carter, a man whose dreams of winning the middleweight boxing title were destroyed when he was arrested along with another man for the murders of 3 people in a New Jersey bar. Wrongfully accused, Carter and John Artis were sentenced to 3 life terms in prison.

programme.title: Don't Knock Twice
programme.desc: A mother looking to reconnect with her estranged daughter attracts the attention of a demonic witch.

programme.title: Persona
programme.desc: Two injured women find themselves trapped inside a secluded home with no memory of how they got there. Scared, confused, and distrustful of each other, they must figure out a way to escape before their captor comes back for them.

programme.title: Kickback
programme.desc: A documentary following the decades-long crusade of investigative journalist Andrew Jennings to expose corruption inside FIFA, football's sole governing body and the largest sports organization in the world.

programme.title: Harriet the Spy
programme.desc: Harriet (Michelle Trachtenberg) may only be in the sixth grade, but she's already found her calling: to be a spy. It seems harmless enough until, one day, someone finds the journal and exposes Harriet's critical thoughts about her classmates. Sudd

programme.title: Mirror Mirror
programme.desc: Snow White (Lily Collins), an orphaned princess, is the rightful ruler of her kingdom, but a jealous, evil queen (Julia Roberts) schemes to gain control. When a charming prince (Armie Hammer) spurns the queen in favor of Snow White, she has the princess thrown into the woods to be devoured by a fearsome beast. Rescued by a band of diminutive highway robbers, Snow White vows to take back her realm

programme.title: Ella Enchanted
programme.desc: As a baby, Ella (Anne Hathaway) receives a visit from Lucinda (Vivica A. Fox), her fairy godmother, and is bestowed with a magical talent that requires her to obey anything that she is told to do. This proves to be more of a curse than a blessing, particularly once her mother dies and she is forced to live with the cruel Dame Olga (Joanna Lumley). Eventually, Ella embarks on a journey to find Luci

programme.title: An Unfinished Life
programme.desc: Einar (Robert Redford), a recovering alcoholic rancher who lives with his loyal pal Mitch (Morgan Freeman), gets an unexpected visit from his daughter-in-law, Jean (Jennifer Lopez), and granddaughter, Griff (Becca Gardner). programme.title: Dean
programme.desc: An illustrator falls in love with a woman while trying to keep his father from burning down the family home after his wife dies.

programme.title: Good Burger
programme.desc: Teen misfits (Kel Mitchell, Kenan Thompson) at a modest burger joint face competition from a hamburger emporium across the street.

programme.title: Harriet the Spy
programme.desc: Harriet (Michelle Trachtenberg) may only be in the sixth grade, but she's already found her calling: to be a spy. programme.title: Bran Nue Dae
programme.desc: A rebellious young man runs away from home but returns after experiencing an amazing journey.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: The Federation calls on Adm. James T. Kirk (William Shatner) and the crew of the Starship Enterprise to contain an immense nimbused object that's on a crash course with Earth. After investigating, the crew discovers that the alien cloud harbors artificial intelligence with an ominous primary directive. Crisis strikes when a probe dispatched by the energy cloud attacks the crew, abducting navigator

programme.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
programme.desc: As Adm. James T. Kirk (William Shatner) and Capt. Spock (Leonard Nimoy) monitor trainees at Starfleet Academy, another vessel from the United Federation of Planets is about to try out the planet-creating Genesis Device in a seemingly deserted portion of space. In the process, two of Kirk's officers are captured by Khan (Ricardo Montalban), an enemy Kirk thought he'd never see again. Once more, Kir

programme.title: Star Trek III: The Search for Spock
programme.desc: Adm. James T. Kirk (William Shatner) has defeated his archenemy but at great cost. His friend Spock has apparently been killed, the USS Enterprise is being scrapped, and starship physician Dr. Leonard "Bones" McCoy (DeForest Kelley) has taken ill. McCoy's odd behavior is evidence he's harboring Spock's katra, or animating spirit, and Kirk seeks to take the Enterprise back to the Genesis Planet and

programme.title: The Wild Thornberrys Movie
programme.desc: The Wild Thornberrys feature film finds one of America's favorite animated families going on wild adventures around the world. Now, 12-year-old Eliza is in Africa where she meets a mysterious shaman who grants her the power to talk to animals. But there's a catch -- if she reveals her gift she will lose it forever. One day Eliza discovers that poachers plan to kill an elephant herd with an electri

programme.title: The Rugrats Movie
programme.desc: This animated comedy finds Tommy Pickles (E.G. Daily) trying to return his baby brother to the hospital after being warned by his mean-spirited friend, Angelica (Cheryl Chase), that once his new sibling is born his parents won't care about him. But, soon after they embark on the mission, Tommy and his friends lose their way in the woods and get into trouble with a pack of wild monkeys who have esc

programme.title: Rugrats in Paris: The Movie
programme.desc: In the long-running animated series' second feature film, the focus is on the show's perennial second banana, Chuckie (Christine Cavanaugh). Dads Stu (Jack Riley) and Chaz (Michael Bell) are unexpectedly sent to Euro-Reptarland in Paris, where the animatronic dinosaurs they built for the amusement park are malfunctioning, much to the displeasure of manager Coco La Bouche (Susan Sarandon). When the

programme.title: Rugrats Go Wild
programme.desc: Chuckie (Nancy Cartwright) and Tommy (Elizabeth Daily) find themselves stranded with their parents on a remote island. By coincidence, the adventurous Thornberrys are also exploring the island. So, with his talking dog, Spike (Bruce Willis), in tow, Tommy takes Chuckie on a walkabout meant to find Donnie Thornberry (Flea) and his sister, Eliza (Lacey Chabert). They'll need to be careful, though, a

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The four nations of Air, Water, Earth and Fire lived in harmony until the Fire Nation declared war. A century later, there is still no end in sight to the destruction, then, an Avatar named Aang (Noah Ringer) discovers that he has the power to control the four elements. He joins forces with Katara (Nicola Peltz), a Waterbender, and her brother, Sokka, to restore balance and harmony to their world.

programme.title: Quantum of Solace
programme.desc: Following the death of Vesper Lynd, James Bond (Daniel Craig) makes his next mission personal. The hunt for those who blackmailed his lover leads him to ruthless businessman Dominic Greene (Mathieu Amalric), a key player in the organization which coerced Vesper. Bond learns that Greene is plotting to gain total control of a vital natural resource, and he must navigate a minefield of danger and tre

programme.title: Virtuosity
programme.desc: A former cop who has been imprisoned for murdering the psychopath who killed his family, Parker Barnes (Denzel Washington) is recruited to test out a new virtual-reality program where the goal is to apprehend a computer-generated being called SID 6.7 (Russell Crowe), who has been modeled on hundreds of deranged criminals. When SID manages to escape into the real world, Barnes must capture or destr

programme.title: John Carpenter's Escape From L.A.
programme.desc: In 2013, the United States president was exiling all citizens who don't conform to his hyper-conservative views to Los Angeles, which became an island after a huge earthquake. But, when the president's daughter nabs the detonator to her dad's apocalyptic weapon and sneaks into L.A. to be with the rebel leader she loves, the government taps commando-turned-crook Snake Plissken to retrieve the young

programme.title: Killerman
programme.desc: Moe Diamond is a New York City money launderer who wakes up with no memory and millions of dollars in stolen cash and drugs. He must soon scour the streets in search of answers while trying to dodge a crew of violent and crooked cops.

programme.title: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: Crystal Lake's history of murder doesn't deter counselors from setting up a summer camp in the woodsy area. Superstitious locals warn against it, but the fresh-faced young people -- Jack (Kevin Bacon), Alice (Adrienne King), Bill (Harry Crosby), Marcie (Jeannine Taylor) and Ned (Mark Nelson) -- pay little heed to the old-timers. Then they find themselves stalked by a brutal killer. As they're slas

programme.title: Borrego
programme.desc: After witnessing a drug mule's plane crash in the Borrego desert, Elly is kidnapped and forced on a dangerous journey to a remote drop-off point. With limited essentials and alone in the desert with her captor, desperation for survival takes hold as Elly risks her life to escape from his clutches before the trip turns deadly.

programme.title: Before Dawn
programme.desc: A young man joins his countrymen on the Western front of World War I, hoping to expedite an end to the bloody conflict. However, as the battle rages on, he's forced to grapple with the brutal realities of trench warfare, including a near-constant struggle to keep himself alive without leaving another man behind.

programme.title: The Return
programme.desc: After 20 years away, Odysseus washes up on the shores of Ithaca, haggard and unrecognizable. The king finds much has changed since he left to fight in the Trojan War. His beloved wife, Penelope, is a prisoner in her own home and hounded to choose a new husband. Their son faces death at the hands of suitors who see him as an obstacle in their pursuit of Penelope and the kingdom. Odysseus is no long

programme.title: Freedom's Path
programme.desc: When Union soldier William runs from battle, he's taken to safety by a heroic young Black man. Kitch is part of a secret community of freed slaves running a section of the Underground Railroad, but a desperate slave catcher is on their trail.

programme.title: Slingshot
programme.desc: An astronaut struggles to maintain his grip on reality during a possibly compromised mission to Saturn's moon, Titan.

programme.title: Snag
programme.desc: A lone wolf's quiet existence gets shattered when he learns that the woman he once loved and thought was dead is alive and being held captive by ruthless gangsters. Now, to take on this dangerous criminal organization, he must seek out allies and storm into a world of violence to rescue the love of his life.

programme.title: Heist 88
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind decides to pull one last job before going to prison and recruits a group of young bank employees to steal millions in a daring and brazen assault on the U.S. banking system.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Seasoned adventurer Dirk Pitt (Matthew McConaughey) sets out for the African desert with his sarcastic companion (Steve Zahn) in search of a ship rumored to have vanished long ago, the main draw being the treasure supposedly hidden within the lost vessel. When the daring duo come across a beautiful scientist (Penélope Cruz) who is juggling an escape from a warlord and a mission to stop the spread

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger
programme.desc: Agent Jack Ryan (Harrison Ford) becomes acting deputy director of the CIA when Admiral Greer (James Earl Jones) is diagnosed with cancer. When an American businessman, and friend of the president, is murdered on a yacht, Ryan starts discovering links between the man and drug dealers. As CIA agent John Clark (Willem Dafoe) is sent to Colombia to kill drug kingpins in retaliation, Ryan must fight th

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Fire expert Jean-Claude Van Damme leaps into action when vicious terrorist Powers Boothe kidnaps the Vice President and threatens to vaporise a packed ice hockey stadium.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: Transformers prequel starring Hailee Steinfeld as a teenager who discovers and revives the battle-scarred Bumblebee in a junkyard. With John Cena and Justin Theroux.

programme.title: The Beekeeper
programme.desc: Jason Statham stings the enemy in a brutal hunt for vengeance, which escalates after he is revealed to be part of a powerful organisation. Action-packed Sky Original film.

programme.title: Blood For Dust
programme.desc: Drowning in the pressure of providing for his family, a travelling salesman is drawn into a world of crime by his mysterious colleague, Kit Harington.

programme.title: Prisoner Of War
programme.desc: A British RAF Wing Commander during World War II is captured and forced to fight in a Japanese internment camp in this action thriller.

programme.title: Wrath Of The Titans
programme.desc: Sam Worthington is again thrown into action as demi-god Perseus, charged with saving Ancient Greece from the monstrous Kronos. Action. Fantasy violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Bumblebee
programme.desc: Transformers prequel starring Hailee Steinfeld as a teenager who discovers and revives the battle-scarred Bumblebee in a junkyard. With John Cena and Justin Theroux.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: Lucius is forced to enter the Colosseum to bring glory back to Rome. BAFTA-nominated long-awaited sequel to Ridley Scott's historical epic.

programme.title: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Wise-cracking Miami cops Will Smith and Martin Lawrence fight to protect a witness and bring down a heroin crook. Action comedy.

programme.title: Fuze
programme.desc: An unexploded WWII bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: Michael Keaton's Bruce Wayne takes on Jack Nicholson's villainous Joker. Gothic Gotham fantasy directed by Tim Burton. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: Blockbuster action as Gotham braces itself for a showdown between the caped crusader, Catwoman and the Penguin.

programme.title: The Beekeeper
programme.desc: Jason Statham stings the enemy in a brutal hunt for vengeance, which escalates after he is revealed to be part of a powerful organisation. Action-packed Sky Original film.

programme.title: Adulthood
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents' basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed.

programme.title: The Wedding Banquet
programme.desc: A gay man makes a deal with his lesbian friend - a green-card marriage for him, in exchange for in vitro fertilisation treatments for her. Romantic comedy, starring Bowen Yang, Lily Gladstone and Kelly Marie Tran.

programme.title: My Dead Friend Zoe
programme.desc: An Afghanistan veteran comes head to head with her Vietnam vet grandfather at the family's lake house. Comedy drama, starring Sonequa Martin-Green (The Walking Dead), Natalie Morales and Ed Harris.

programme.title: Napoleon Dynamite
programme.desc: A socially inept high-school student and his lonely unemployed brother find their eccentric home life thrown into upheaval when their meddling uncle comes to stay. The teenage oddball tries to make the best of his changing circumstances, while putting all his skills to the task of helping his new best friend win the class presidency. Comedy, starring Jon Heder, Efren Ramirez and Haylie Duff.

programme.title: Eddington
programme.desc: A stand-off between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbours are pitted against each other in Eddington, New Mexico. Modern-day Western, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Emma Stone and Pedro Pascal.

programme.title: Big Daddy
programme.desc: An immature 32-year-old is heartbroken when his girlfriend walks out on him. In a plan to win her back, he volunteers to look after his flatmate's five-year-old son, thus demonstrating he is finally ready to grow up. However, his ideas of childcare prove unconventional and chaos quickly ensues. Comedy, with Adam Sandler, Joey Lauren Adams, Jon Stewart, Josh Mostel, Leslie Mann, Rob Schneider and K

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: A former member of a singing trio, now running a hotel on a Greek island, is reunited with her old bandmates for her daughter's wedding - but is surprised when three of her old flames also show up unexpectedly. The three men have been invited by the bride, who wants to find out which one of them is her father. Musical comedy, with a soundtrack of Abba songs, starring Meryl Streep, Pierce Brosnan,

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: It's five years since Sophie invited her three possible dads to her wedding, and now most of her family are reunited as she prepares for the grand reopening of the Hotel Bella Donna. Along the way, she learns more about her mother's past. Abba-themed musical sequel, starring Amanda Seyfried, Lily James, Pierce Brosnan, Cher and Andy Garcia.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: Boozy playboy Arthur Bach is content to drift through life without ambition and await the multimillion-dollar inheritance due to him following an arranged high-society wedding. However, on the threshold of the nuptials, Arthur falls for a penniless shoplifter and begins to doubt whether he wants to go through with the ceremony. Comedy, starring Dudley Moore, Liza Minnelli and an Oscar-winning John

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary
programme.desc: A single woman begins a new year with resolutions to find love, quit her bad habits and take a step up the career ladder. Her plans crumble as she tries to deal with her mother's infidelity, get over a passionate fling with her boss and come to terms with her feelings for an uptight lawyer. Romantic comedy based on Helen Fielding's novel, starring Renee Zellweger, Hugh Grant and Colin Firth.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An idealistic lawyer catches the attention of a real-estate tycoon, who offers her a job. She starts out thinking she can change his venal ways, but quickly tires of running his life for him. Finding himself in desperate need of her support, the self-absorbed millionaire pulls out all the stops to win her back. Romantic comedy, starring Sandra Bullock, Hugh Grant, Alicia Witt and Dana Ivey.

programme.title: Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: When a perfect night with a stranger ends suddenly, Charlotte searches for answers and meaning in her life. She soon uncovers a shocking secret that changes everything.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Retired boxer Orlando Bloom returns to the ring for one last shot at the title, but must embark on an illegal weight cut program first. Language/violence/sex/mature themes.

programme.title: ...And Justice For All
programme.desc: Al Pacino, an idealistic lawyer trapped in a hypocritical and corrupt legal system, finds himself defending a self-righteous judge. Satirical drama.

programme.title: Beach Rats
programme.desc: Powerful drama about a troubled Brooklyn teen aimlessly drifting through summer while struggling to come to terms with his own desires. From Sundance winner Eliza Hittman.

programme.title: Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: When a perfect night with a stranger ends suddenly, Charlotte searches for answers and meaning in her life. She soon uncovers a shocking secret that changes everything.

programme.title: Jackie
programme.desc: Following the assassination of John F Kennedy, First Lady Jacqueline Kennedy fights through grief to regain her faith and define her husband's legacy. Natalie Portman stars.

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: Oscar-winning Sandra Bullock plays a wealthy mum who takes in a boy from a broken home and helps him achieve his pro football dreams. Drama. Violence/mild sexual references.(123mins).

programme.title: Drift
programme.desc: A young woman escapes her war-torn country to a Greek island, growing close with a tour guide as the pair find hope in each other. Drama.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: New girl Sandy causes a ruckus at Rydell High when stud Danny falls for her. Classic musical with John Travolta and the late Olivia Newton-John.

programme.title: Grease 2
programme.desc: The T-Birds aren't impressed when clean cut new boy Maxwell Caulfield becomes a Cool Rider and makes a play for Pink Lady Michelle Pfeiffer.

programme.title: Joker: Folie A Deux
programme.desc: Joaquin Phoenix returns to his Oscar-winning role, as an incarcerated Arthur Fleck meets his true love: Lady Gaga's Harley Quinn.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon moves to a Midwest town, but finds dancing and music banned by zealous preacher John Lithgow. Foot-tapping 80s favourite. Violence and discriminatory language.

programme.title: Jackie
programme.desc: Following the assassination of John F Kennedy, First Lady Jacqueline Kennedy fights through grief to regain her faith and define her husband's legacy. Natalie Portman stars.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go! To The Movies
programme.desc: Join the Teen Titans on a Hollywood adventure as they fulfil their dream of starring in their very own superhero movie. With Kristen Bell and Will Arnett.

programme.title: Buffalo Kids
programme.desc: Arriving in New York City in 1886, two orphaned Irish siblings embark on a wild cross-country journey aboard a transcontinental train.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: After a shipwreck, an intelligent robot called Roz survives the harsh environments of an uninhabited island with the help of wild animals.

programme.title: Mousehunt
programme.desc: Lee Evans and Nathan Lane are the bumbling brothers whose plans to renovate a valuable building are thwarted by a super smart rodent. Comedy with Christopher Walken.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The ninja turtles emerge from the sewers below to protect New York from the villainous Shredder. Hit action fun with Megan Fox.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows
programme.desc: The turtles are back battling bad guys when Shredder busts out of custody and teams up with Krang.

programme.title: The Lego Movie
programme.desc: An ordinary Lego construction worker becomes responsible for stopping a dastardly tyrant. Animated hit with an all-star voice cast. Flashing images.

programme.title: DC League Of Super Pets
programme.desc: Dwayne Johnson stars as the voice of Krypto the Super-Dog, who must convince a rag-tag shelter pack to rescue the Justice League.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: Family animation about a theatre-owning koala who holds a singing competition in a last-ditch bid to stay afloat.

programme.title: The Smurfs 2
programme.desc: Evil wizard Gargamel kidnaps Smurfette so she can turn his mischievous Smurf-like creatures into real Smurfs. Contains flashing images.

programme.title: Smurfs: The Lost Village
programme.desc: A mysterious map sends Smurfette, Brainy, Clumsy and Hefty on a thrilling adventure into the Forbidden Forest. Animated fun with the voices of Demi Lovato and Julia Roberts.

programme.title: Jumanji: Welcome To The Jungle
programme.desc: Four teens in detention discover an old video game that sucks them into the dangerous world of Jumanji. Dwayne Johnson stars.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: Beatrix Potter adaptation with James Corden voicing the mischievous rabbit whose feud with the McGregors reaches new heights.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles and Tails reunite to battle Shadow, a mysterious new enemy with powers unlike anything they've faced before.

programme.title: Terms Of Endearment
programme.desc: Oscar-winning tearjerker about the fraught relationship between eccentric Shirley MacLaine and headstrong daughter Debra Winger. With Jack Nicholson. Strong language/sex.

programme.title: Bye Bye Birdie
programme.desc: A rock singer travels to a small Ohio town for his farewell television performance before being drafted. Comedy musical with Dick Van Dyke.

programme.title: Birdy
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage returns from Vietnam to find his childhood friend, Birdy (Matthew Modine) psychologically crushed by the war. Haunting drama. Contains strong language/sex.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Black British...
programme.desc: This Black History Month, join us as we take a look at the work of some exceptionally talented Black British actors, from Naomie Harris to Idris Elba and beyond.

programme.title: Multiplicity
programme.desc: Harassed dad Michael Keaton can't do six things at once, so he agrees to clone himself. Smart comedy from the director of Groundhog Day. Contains violence/sexual scenes.

programme.title: Harriet The Spy
programme.desc: Wannabe writer Harriet loses her book of secrets. What will her friends think when they find out what she's written? Adventure with Rosie O'Donnell.

programme.title: The Wizard Of Oz
programme.desc: Victor Fleming's Oscar-winning classic about a young girl, swept away from her home into the magical land of Oz. With Judy Garland, Ray Bolger and Bert Lahr.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: A man trapped inside a magical boardgame is freed with a zoo-full of rampaging jungle beasts. Wild fantasy adventure with Robin Williams.

programme.title: E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: Steven Spielberg's hugely successful sci-fi drama about a young boy who makes friends with a stranded alien. With Drew Barrymore and Henry Thomas. Contains flashing images.

programme.title: Birdy
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage returns from Vietnam to find his childhood friend, Birdy (Matthew Modine) psychologically crushed by the war. Haunting drama. Contains strong language/sex.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars as a struggling sports agent who falls for single mum Renee Zellweger. Top romantic comedy with Cuba Gooding Jr. Language.

programme.title: An Officer And A Gentleman
programme.desc: Classic romantic drama starring Richard Gere as a troubled trainee naval officer who falls for Debra Winger's sassy factory girl. Strong language/moderate sex and nudity.

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke
programme.desc: Paul Newman is unforgettable as the defiant Deep South chain-gang prisoner whose rebellion makes him a hero with fellow inmates. An Oscar-winning George Kennedy co-stars.

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married
programme.desc: Peggy faints and wakes up to find herself back in 1960, leading her to try to spot and correct the mistakes that led to disappointments and an unhappy marriage.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of his legendary father, Frank Drebin Jr must save his police department by solving a case. Comedy reboot, starring Liam Neeson, Pamela Anderson and Danny Huston.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: While investigating the shooting of a colleague, disaster-prone police lieutenant Frank Drebin uncovers a plot to assassinate the Queen during her visit to Los Angeles. However, after he is sacked from the force by the mayor, the cop has to operate beneath the radar to get to the bottom of the conspiracy. Comedy, with Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley and Ricardo Montalban.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Blundering cop Frank Drebin discovers a secret conspiracy to kidnap a renowned solar energy expert and replace him with an imposter. As he sets out to bring the perpetrators to justice, he is unexpectedly reunited with an old flame. Slapstick comedy sequel, starring Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley, George Kennedy, Richard Griffiths and OJ Simpson.

programme.title: Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Inept police detective Frank Drebin plans to retire from the force, but is lured back by the opportunity to foil a terrorist plot. Going undercover in prison, he sets out to prevent an evil mastermind from escaping and carrying out his fiendish plan - to bomb the Oscar awards ceremony. Comedy sequel, starring Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley, OJ Simpson, George Kennedy and Fred Ward.

programme.desc: Inept police detective Frank Drebin plans to retire from the force, but is lured back by the opportunity to foil a terrorist plot. Going undercover in prison, he sets out to prevent an evil mastermind from escaping and carrying out his fiendish plan - to bomb the Oscar awards ceremony. Comedy sequel, starring Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley, OJ Simpson, George Kennedy and Fred Ward.

programme.title: The Naked Gun
